title: Giant Torii
description: Adds a Giant Torii to the cherry grove biome
body:
### Giant Torii

**This simple mod adds a giant Torii to the Cherry Grove biome**
![Torii](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6465027a739a6fc3e8821363f2ed8ea2e484f12c.jpeg)


- The terrain around the torii is designed to blend naturally with the cherry grove biome.
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Torii](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64928fa22d9558677eba3fa5e00ba75ed777d65.jpeg)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
